animation.negative_prompt: {identity_prompt}, extra limbs, extra arms, mutated hands, fused fingers, deformed, blurry, low quality, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text

pose.negative_prompt: {identity_prompt}, {direction_prompt}, deformed, blurry, low quality, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text

EAST.positive_prompt: a clean full-body side profile, the whole character turned 90 degrees to face the right edge of the frame — the side-on orientation a character has when facing right in a 2D side-scrolling platformer, standing upright with legs straight and together. The head is shown in pure lateral profile: a single hemisphere fills the head silhouette as one rounded lobe, with the deep central groove that divides the two halves running along the top of the head and away from the camera, out of view. Exactly one eye is visible, on the side facing us. The body is fully sideways, chest toward the right edge, one arm at the near side, the near leg overlapping the far leg, both shoes seen edge-on with the toes pointing right.
EAST.negative_prompt: far eye, second eye, both eyes visible, two eyes

SOUTH_EAST.positive_prompt: a three-quarter front view, the character turned about 45 degrees to face toward the lower-right of the frame — halfway between the front view and the right side profile, an orthographic character-turnaround three-quarter front pose, the head angled toward the lower right. Both eyes are in view, the near eye larger and the far eye foreshortened. The deep central groove that divides the two hemispheres runs down the front but off-center, shifted toward the near side and curving up over the crown, so the near hemisphere reads larger than the far one. The near arm is full and forward; the far arm recedes behind the torso with just its edge showing. The legs angle toward the right, both shoes pointing toward the lower right, the far shoe partly behind the near one.

SOUTH.positive_prompt: a symmetrical, dead-on front view facing the viewer — an orthographic character-turnaround front pose, body squared to the camera. The head is seen from the front; both eyes are in view, level and centered low on the front of the head. The deep central groove that divides the two hemispheres runs straight down the vertical midline, splitting the head into symmetric left and right halves. The body faces forward, both arms at the sides, the front of the clothing visible, both shoes seen from the front and side by side.

NORTH_EAST.positive_prompt: a three-quarter back view, the character turned to face mostly away and toward the right edge of the frame — halfway between the back view and the right side profile, an orthographic character-turnaround three-quarter back pose. The rounded rear of the head is toward the viewer and the face is turned away to the far side. The deep central groove that divides the two hemispheres runs down the back but off-center, shifted toward the near side and curving up over the crown. The back of the body and clothing is in view; the near arm shows at its side and the far arm is tucked behind the torso. The legs angle toward the right, the shoes seen from behind and the side with the heels showing, toes pointing away to the right.

NORTH.positive_prompt: a symmetrical back view, the whole character turned 180 degrees to face directly away — an orthographic character-turnaround back pose. The smooth rounded rear of the head faces the viewer and the face is turned fully away. The deep central groove that divides the two hemispheres runs straight down the vertical midline of the back of the head, splitting it into symmetric left and right halves. The back of the body and clothing is in view, both arms at the sides, both shoes seen from behind with the heels and soles showing, toes pointing away, symmetrical down the center line.

EAST.positive_prompt: The same right-facing side profile and head facing as the reference are preserved; only the body re-poses. In profile the mid-stride reads clearly: the near leg crossing in front of the far leg, the arms swung into opposition front-to-back, both feet edge-on with the toes pointing right.
EAST.negative_prompt: far eye, second eye, both eyes visible, two eyes

In profile the sprint reads clearly: the lead knee high and forward, the trailing leg extended back off the toe, the arms pumping in opposition, both feet edge-on and off the ground, toes pointing right.

In profile the crouch reads clearly: the bent knees pushing forward, the hips dropped low and back, the body folded compact toward the ground, both feet flat and edge-on with the toes pointing right.

In profile the airborne tuck reads clearly: the knees pulled up in front of the torso, the lower legs folded back beneath, the feet lifted and edge-on with the toes pointing right, the figure suspended off the ground.

walk.positive_prompt: The character walks forward at a steady, even pace in a clear alternating gait. One leg lifts at the hip, the knee bends to clear the ground, the foot swings through and plants heel-first then rolls onto the toe, and as the weight transfers the opposite leg repeats the same cycle. The hips rock subtly with each weight shift and the torso stays upright and balanced over the supporting leg. The arms swing loosely front-to-back in natural opposition to the legs, elbows slightly bent. The head bobs gently up and down once per step, dipping as each foot plants. The motion completes one full two-step stride cycle and returns to the exact starting pose for a seamless loop.

run.positive_prompt: The character runs forward at full speed, the torso pitched slightly forward into its momentum. The legs drive in a fast, springy alternating stride: each knee lifts high, the foot pushes off hard and extends behind, and there is a brief fully airborne moment between footfalls where neither foot touches the ground. The arms pump back and forth in strong opposition to the legs, elbows bent sharper than in a walk. The head bobs up and down once per stride with more force than a walk, and the body rises and falls with each push-off. The motion completes one full two-step stride cycle and returns to the starting pose for a seamless loop.

skid_stop.positive_prompt: The character brakes hard out of a run. It plants both feet forward and leans its weight sharply back to fight the forward momentum, the legs stiffening and the feet skidding a short distance across the ground. The arms swing outward and slightly up to catch its balance and the torso counter-rotates against the slide. The head stays roughly level through the stop, lagging back slightly with the deceleration, then the body settles upright into a neutral standing stance as the slide ends.

dash.positive_prompt: The character bursts forward in a sudden horizontal ground dash. It drops low and coils onto its back leg, then drives off that leg explosively to shoot ahead at speed, the body kept low and streamlined. The arms sweep back and tuck close along the sides and the head leads the motion, held level and thrust forward. After the burst the body eases up and settles into a neutral standing stance. A fast, snappy, low ground burst with a quick start and a short recovery.

slide.positive_prompt: The character drops into a low feet-first ground slide. From a run it ducks down sharply, kicks one leg forward and drops its hips low to skim along the ground, the trailing leg folded under it and the torso leaned back and compact. The arms tuck in close to the body. After skimming forward it plants its feet, pushes the torso back upright, and rises into a neutral standing stance. A quick, low slide for passing beneath obstacles.

jump_launch.positive_prompt: The character performs the launch of a single jump. It first crouches low, the knees bending deeply and the torso compressing downward to load the leap as the head dips. Then it explodes upward as both legs extend and push off the ground hard, the body stretching tall and the head pulled skyward. As it leaves the ground it tucks its legs up beneath it and the arms lift slightly with the upward rush. The clip ends as the body rises into the air with the legs gathered into a tuck.

jump_apex.positive_prompt: The character hovers at the very top of its jump arc, the body floating nearly weightless as the upward and downward momentum cancel out. The legs stay tucked up beneath it, the arms are held slightly raised, and the head settles level. Only a faint floating drift of motion, holding the airborne peak pose for a seamless loop.

fall.positive_prompt: The character falls downward through the air, gaining speed as it drops. From the tucked airborne pose the legs begin to extend and reach down below it toward the ground, the arms drift upward against the rising air resistance, and the torso braces for the coming impact while the head stays up. A continuous downward plummet ending with the legs reaching down, braced just before impact.

land.positive_prompt: The character lands and absorbs the impact of a fall. The feet hit the ground and the knees bend deeply to cushion it, the torso compressing down and the head dipping low with the shock of landing. Then the legs straighten, the body springs back up, and it settles into a neutral standing stance. A sharp downward impact followed by a quick recovery.

double_jump.positive_prompt: The character snaps into a second jump in mid-air. From the airborne tuck the body gives a sharp renewed upward burst as the legs kick down and then re-tuck beneath it, the arms swing up with the fresh lift, and the head rises again with the boost. A crisp, snappy mid-air second leap that re-launches the body upward and returns to the tucked airborne pose.

crouch_entry.positive_prompt: The character ducks from standing down into a low crouch. The knees bend deeply and the hips sink, the whole body folding and compacting downward, the torso leaning in over the legs and the head lowering toward the ground. It settles into a low, braced, hunkered pose and holds there.

crouch_exit.positive_prompt: The character rises out of a low crouch back up to standing. The knees straighten and the hips lift, the torso extending upward and the head rising with it, until the body settles into a neutral upright standing stance.

standing_idle.positive_prompt: The character stands in place in a relaxed, settled stance. The chest rises and falls with slow, steady breathing and the body sways very gently from side to side. The arms hang loosely and almost still at its sides, and the head drifts in tiny, almost imperceptible movements. Only this quiet ambient idle motion, returning to the starting pose for a seamless loop.

crouch_idle.positive_prompt: The character holds a low crouch in place, staying down with the knees bent and the hips low. The body breathes with a slow rise and fall and sways very gently. The arms hang loosely down between the knees and the head stays lowered. Calm, quiet, and holding low, returning to the starting pose for a seamless loop.

fighting_stance_entry.positive_prompt: The character shifts from a relaxed standing pose into a ready fighting stance. It steps one foot forward and the other back to stagger its footing, bends its knees to drop its weight low and springy, and squares its torso toward the right. Both arms lift from its sides and bend at the elbows, the fists rising into a guard in front of the chest and head, the lead fist held forward and a little lower and the rear fist tucked in close beside the head. The head stays level and settles facing forward to the right. It locks into the braced, poised guard and holds, weight balanced and ready. A clean, deliberate transition from rest into a combat-ready stance.

fighting_stance_idle.positive_prompt: The character holds a ready fighting stance: weight low on staggered feet with the knees bent, both arms raised in a fists-up guard in front of the chest and head, the lead fist forward and lower and the rear fist tucked in close beside the head. It bobs and sways very gently in place with light, springy, ready energy, shifting its weight subtly between its feet, while both fists stay up and the guard stays intact throughout. The head stays level facing forward to the right. Only this small ready-stance bounce, returning to the starting pose for a seamless loop.

fighting_stance_exit.positive_prompt: The character drops out of its fighting stance back into a relaxed standing pose. It lowers its fists, unstaggers its feet, and settles upright, the head returning to a level neutral rest.

punch.negative_prompt: both arms extended, second arm raised, flailing arm, floating arm, waving arms, morphing arm, extra arm, off-hand punching, two-armed punch
punch.positive_prompt: The character throws a straight punch forward to the right. It winds up by rolling its lead shoulder back and loading its weight onto the rear leg, both arms drawing in close to the body. Then it explosively drives its lead arm straight forward into a sharp jab, the fist snapping out to full extension at speed, while the opposite arm stays pulled in and tucked tight against the chest as a fixed guard, held close to the body and never extending, raising, or flailing. The torso and hips pivot hard into the punch to drive the force, then the lead arm retracts and both arms resettle into a neutral guard. The head stays level and steady throughout. A powerful, committed strike with a clear wind-up, a single explosive arm extension, and a crisp recovery.

kick.positive_prompt: The character throws a quick forward kick to the right. It shifts its weight back onto its rear leg, then snaps its front leg up and out in a sharp straight kick, the foot driving forward to full extension before retracting and planting back down as the body resettles into a neutral stance. The arms swing out slightly to counterbalance and the head stays level. A fast, snappy kick with a clean extension and recovery.

headbutt.positive_prompt: The character lunges into a headbutt to the right. It rears the head back and drops its stance to load up the weight, then thrusts the entire head forward and slightly down in a powerful slam, the body and hips driving hard behind it to commit the full mass into the blow. It then snaps back upright and resettles into a neutral stance. A heavy, committed headbutt that leads with the head's full weight.

block.positive_prompt: The character braces into a defensive guard. It plants its feet, tenses low and compact, and raises both arms crossed in front of the head and torso to shield itself, holding the braced, protective stance steady with only faint tension and breathing. A held guard pose, returning to the starting pose for a seamless loop.

stomp.positive_prompt: From an airborne tuck the character drops straight down in a hard ground stomp. It drives both feet down together to slam onto the surface below, the body compressing on impact and the head dipping with the shock, then it rebounds sharply upward off the impact and re-tucks its legs, returning to the airborne pose. A sharp, heavy downward stomp with a bouncing rebound.

wall_cling.positive_prompt: The character clings to a vertical wall, gripping the surface and holding in place, the limbs braced against it and the body pressed close and flat. Almost no motion, only a faint shift of weight and slight tension as it maintains the grip. Holding steady for a seamless loop.

wall_slide.positive_prompt: The character presses flat against a vertical wall and slides slowly downward. The limbs are braced against the surface to drag and slow the descent, the body kept close and flat to the wall, sliding down at a steady controlled rate. A smooth, continuous downward slide that loops.

wall_jump.positive_prompt: The character pushes off a vertical wall in a single explosive burst. Both legs coil and then kick hard against the wall surface to launch the body up and away from it, the arms swinging up with the leap as the body springs out into the air and tucks its legs beneath it. A sharp launch off the wall into an airborne tuck.

climb.positive_prompt: The character climbs steadily upward. It reaches up with one arm to grip, pulls itself up as the legs push from below, then reaches with the opposite arm and repeats, hauling the body upward in a clear, even, alternating climb cycle. Continuous upward climbing motion that returns to the starting pose for a seamless loop.

hurt.positive_prompt: The character flinches and recoils from a hit. The upper body jerks sharply backward and the head snaps back with the impact, the arms flailing out briefly, then the body rocks forward and recovers its balance back toward a neutral stance. A quick stagger-and-recover.

defeat.positive_prompt: The character is defeated. It staggers, the knees buckling and the legs giving way, the torso sagging and the head slumping forward, then the whole body folds downward and collapses limp to the ground. A final stagger into collapse.

surprise.positive_prompt: The character reacts to a sudden jolt of surprise. The whole body stiffens and pops upward with a small hop, straightening tall, the arms flicking outward and the head rising sharply with the surprise, then everything settles back down into a neutral standing stance. A quick burst of energized surprise that resolves cleanly.

disappointment.positive_prompt: The character deflates with disappointment. The body sags and the shoulders drop as the head droops slowly downward in a tired letdown, then it settles into a slumped neutral stance. A soft, gentle slump, lighter and slower than a flinch.

edge_teeter.positive_prompt: The character stands at the very edge of a ledge and wobbles to keep its balance. The body tips forward out over the drop and then rocks back, the arms windmilling and swinging to stay upright, never quite falling. The head sways with the off-balance motion. An unsteady teeter that loops back and forth.

idle_break.positive_prompt: The character does a small idle fidget. It shifts its weight from one foot to the other and gives the body a brief loose settle, the arms swaying slightly and the head craning forward a little then easing back level, before returning to a relaxed neutral standing stance. A brief, subtle bored shuffle that resolves back to rest.

talk.positive_prompt: The character speaks animatedly in conversation. The head bobs and tilts gently with the rhythm of speech, the arms make small expressive gestures, and the body shifts its weight lightly from side to side. Lively conversational motion, returning to the starting pose for a seamless loop.

wonder.positive_prompt: The character is struck with overwhelming wonder. The body rears back and the head tips upward in astonishment as both arms fling wide and high, then it holds the wide-open, marvelling pose at full stretch. A big, breathless reaction of wonder.

cheer.positive_prompt: The character celebrates with excitement, bouncing up and down in place on its legs as both arms pump and wave triumphantly overhead and the head bobs with the joyful energy, then settling back down. Happy, victorious bouncing that returns to the starting pose for a seamless loop.

turn_around.positive_prompt: The character pivots in place to face the opposite direction. The body rotates around as the legs step and reposition beneath it and the head swings through the turn, settling to face the other way. A clean, controlled in-place turnaround.
